description: A structural I-beam centered at the origin, extending along the X-axis with a YZ cross-section.
notes: The I-beam is centered at the origin, meaning X spans from -50 to +50, Y spans from -10 to +10, and Z spans from -20 to +20. It can be modeled either by extruding a 2D I-shape sketch along the X-axis by 100mm, or by unioning three box primitives (top flange: 100x20x3 centered at Z=18.5, bottom flange: 100x20x3 centered at Z=-18.5, web: 100x2x34 centered at Z=0).
